title: QDS Make & Paint Your Own Christmas Figures Santa Elf Penguin Craft Plaster Figurines
features: Make & Paint 4 Christmas Plaster of Paris Figures!
The figures to be created are: Santa, Elf, Penguin & Gingerbread man
Pack includes: Plaster of paris, 4 Paints, 1 Paint Brush & 4 Festive Moulds.
Moulds can be reused numerous times, so if you buy extra plaster of paris you can make many more decorations
Perfect for children who like to get creative, get them into the festive spirit!
